tagline: Restoring balance through the Sunnah and professional care.
intro: Experience Hijama (Wet Cupping Therapy) in a clean, calm and welcoming environment where traditional practice is combined with modern standards of hygiene and compassionate, client-centred care.

offer.title: 20% off for first-time Hijama clients
offer.text: A welcoming introductory offer for new clients.

about.heading: Professional, calm and compassionate care
about.text: Each appointment begins with a personal consultation to discuss your goals, relevant health history and treatment suitability.

services.name: Hijama Using Sunnah Points
services.description: Traditional Hijama using appropriate Sunnah points following consultation.

services.name: Upper Back & Shoulders
services.description: A focused session for the upper back and shoulder area.

services.name: Lower Back
services.description: A personalised cupping session focused on the lower back.

services.name: Women’s Health Support
services.description: A respectful and individualised approach supporting general wellbeing.

services.name: Digestive Health Support
services.description: A personalised session planned around comfort and general wellbeing goals.

services.name: Full Body Hijama
services.description: A longer and more comprehensive session discussed during consultation.

faqs.question: What should I do before my appointment?
faqs.answer: Follow the preparation guidance provided when booking. Contact the practitioner about medications, pregnancy, recent surgery or health concerns.

faqs.question: How long can cupping marks last?
faqs.answer: Temporary marks vary between clients and may remain visible for several days. Aftercare guidance will be provided.

faqs.question: Is Hijama a replacement for medical care?
faqs.answer: No. Hijama is a complementary wellbeing service and does not replace medical diagnosis, treatment or emergency care.

policies.cancellation: Please provide reasonable notice if you need to cancel or reschedule. Detailed cancellation terms are available through the booking page.
policies.privacy: Personal information collected for enquiries and bookings is used only to provide and manage services.
policies.disclaimer: Hijama is a complementary wellbeing service and is not a substitute for medical diagnosis, treatment or emergency care. Medical clearance may be requested where appropriate.

seo.title: Women-Only Hijama in Doncaster East | Balance & Restore
seo.description: Professional women-only Hijama and wet cupping services in Doncaster East, Melbourne.
